$description: South Atlanta District (AME) design tokens — W3C DTCG format. Instance #1 of specs/design/sensory-tokens.md. Verbatim brand values plus the derived 'feel' layer. Feed to Claude Design / Penpot / opendesign to apply the system.

forest.$description: PRIMARY · ground, growth, the church — the primary at every scale

gold.$description: CEREMONIAL · honor, episcopal accent — borders, naming, episcopal references only

sunrise.$description: WITNESS · the rising — accent rules, the emblem, key witness moments. NEVER body text

forest-deep.$description: derived · hero grounds and glow base

ivory.$description: paper ground — not #FFFFFF. [CONFIRM exact value from source art]

typography.$description: Three voices with range — not a rigid ladder. Sizes are fluid (clamp) and meant to be played with; Cormorant may carry large italic display moments, not only body. Rigidity itself reads as the 'AI feel'.

body.$description: body — breathes; no longer locked at 12px

feel.$description: The signature layer — not renderable as a flat token, but the system's soul. Enforce via the devices in theme.css.

gate.$value: Every major surface carries >=1 luminous-warmth device; palette-correct-but-flat = fail.

motto.$value: The Best Is Yet to Come.
